name: NetPay International, Inc.
summary: NetPay International, Inc. does not have significant operations. Previously, it was engaged in the developing, manufacturing, marketing, and selling of hair-care products. The company was formerly known as Allegro Beauty Products, Inc. and changed its name to NetPay International, Inc. in November 2018. NetPay International, Inc. was founded in 2016 and is based in Herzliya, Israel.
